data.description:

data.title: BlackRock’s Crypto Holdings Balloon As Bitcoin, Ethereum Reach For New ATHs — Here Are The Numbers
data.description:
BlackRock’s cryptocurrency portfolio has surpassed the $100 billion mark, as Bitcoin and Ethereum push to new all-time highs. The world’s largest asset manager now holds nearly $104 billion in digital assets, and this achievement came as Bitcoin briefly broke above $124,000 on August 14, 2025, to set a new price record before consolidating between $118,000 and $121,000. Ethereum also surged to nearly $4,790, just shy of its 2021 peak of $4,878. BlackRock’s Expanding Digital Asset Portfolio Bitcoin and Ethereum have been on a price roll in recent weeks, and a large part of this momentum can be attributed to steady institutional inflows into Spot Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs based in the US
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/blackrocks-bitcoin-ethereum/

data.title: SEC Chair Aims to Establish U.S. as Global Cryptocurrency Hub
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chair Paul Atkins has announced efforts to mobilize all departments to position the United States as a leading center for Bitcoin and cryptocurrency globally.

data.title: OpenAI Founder Sam Altman Interested in Acquiring Chrome Amid Potential U.S. Government Action
data.description: According to BlockBeats, OpenAI founder Sam Altman has expressed interest in acquiring Chrome if the U.S. government compels Google to sell the browser. Additionally, OpenAI is planning to fund a competitor to Neuralink, a company focused on brain-machine interfaces.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Goolsbee Expresses Concern Over Inflation Data
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve official Goolsbee has expressed concern over the latest Producer Price Index (PPI) and Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation data. The recent figures have raised alarms about the current state of inflation, indicating potential challenges for economic stability.

data.title: Traders Adjust Expectations for Federal Reserve Rate Cuts
data.description: According to BlockBeats, traders have reduced their bets on the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates, although they still anticipate a rate cut in September and another one in 2025. This adjustment reflects changing market sentiments regarding monetary policy decisions.

data.title: Top Win International Secures $10 Million Investment Led by WiseLink
data.description:
According to PANews, Nasdaq-listed Top Win International has announced the completion of a $10 million funding round, led by Taiwan-listed company WiseLink Co., Ltd. (TW: 8932). This marks WiseLink as the first Taiwanese listed company to invest in a Bitcoin treasury enterprise.

WiseLink made the investment through a three-year convertible bond and has established a strategic partnership with Top Win to advance a 'Bitcoin + Cross-Border Finance' framework. Top Win plans to primarily use the funds to purchase Bitcoin and potentially invest in publicly listed companies that adopt a Bitcoin treasury strategy, as well as for operational capital. The funding round also attracted other private investors, including Chad Koehn, founder of United Capital Management, along with four other investors.

Previously, on May 16, Top Win rebranded as AsiaStrategy and partnered with Sora Ventures to promote a Bitcoin treasury strategy in Asia.

data.title: Binance Launches MENA Alpha Trading Challenge with 20,000 USDT Rewards
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to introduce the MENA Exclusive Binance Alpha Trading Challenge, running from August 15 to September 15, 2025. This initiative targets verified regular and VIP 1-3 users within the MENA region, including Pakistan, offering them a chance to share 20,000 USDT in token voucher rewards. Participants must trade eligible Alpha tokens via Binance Alpha during the promotion period to qualify.

Eligibility criteria require users to be from qualified regions within MENA, complete account verification (KYC), and be eligible to trade Binance Alpha tokens. Participants must register for the promotion, execute at least one trade, and achieve a cumulative Alpha trading volume of at least $50 during the promotion period. Rankings will be based on cumulative trading volume, with the top 100 traders sharing 9,000 USDT and the top 550 new Alpha users sharing 11,000 USDT.

Promotion A rewards the top traders based on their total Alpha trading volume, with the highest reward being 1,500 USDT for the first place. Promotion B targets new users, offering an equal split of 11,000 USDT among the top 550 participants, capped at 20 USDT per user. Only trades executed via Binance Alpha on eligible tokens will qualify, excluding transactions through Binance Wallet or third-party dApps.

Binance emphasizes caution due to the volatility and risks associated with Alpha tokens, which are on-chain Web3 tokens. The platform reserves the right to disqualify participants involved in dishonest behavior or tampering with program code. USDT token voucher rewards will be distributed within 28 working days after the promotion ends, with a validity period of 30 days for redemption.

data.title: Trader Big Candle Capital Experiences Significant Losses
data.description: According to Foresight News, the trader known as Big Candle Capital (BCC), who previously reported a substantial profit of $114 million in 30 days, experienced a significant asset drawdown of approximately $24.495 million yesterday. Over the past week, BCC's profit and loss curve showed a peak profit of $20.675 million on August 13. However, this quickly turned negative, reaching a loss of $3.82 million yesterday. This downturn may be attributed to holding long positions during a market surge and maintaining or partially reducing these positions during a subsequent sharp decline.

data.title: DeFi Technologies Reports Strong Q2 Financial Results
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, DeFi Technologies, a publicly traded company on Nasdaq under the ticker DEFT, has released its financial results for the second quarter. The company reported an adjusted revenue of $32.1 million, with an adjusted EBITDA of $21.6 million, indicating robust profitability in its core operations. The adjusted net income totaled $17.4 million.

The subsidiary Valour reported an increase in assets under management (AUM), reaching approximately $947 million as of July 31, 2025, marking a 23% increase from the previous quarter. Additionally, the company holds various digital assets valued at around $26 million.

data.title: Czech Police Arrest Darknet Marketplace Founder Amid Bitcoin Donation Scandal
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Czech police have arrested Tomas Jirikovsky, the founder of a darknet marketplace, in connection with a $45 million Bitcoin donation that led to the resignation of former Justice Minister Pavel Blazek earlier this year. The arrest occurred during a police intervention related to the Bitcoin donation case, which prompted Blazek's resignation. Chief State Prosecutor Radim Dragoun stated that authorities were securing individuals and items as part of a criminal case that had been separated for independent proceedings. Although the official statement did not confirm any arrests, local reports indicate that Jirikovsky was detained after allegedly attempting to bribe the minister with 468 BTC to avoid a new prison sentence.

Jirikovsky reportedly tried to evade capture by climbing onto the roof of his home during a police raid on Thursday night. His ex-wife confirmed the incident, noting that a neighbor had alerted her to the situation. The police subsequently apprehended Jirikovsky and took him into custody. Jirikovsky is known as the architect of the illegal darknet marketplace Sheep Marketplace, which was associated with drug trafficking, weapons sales, and counterfeit goods. He was previously sentenced to nine years in prison in 2017 for embezzlement, drug trafficking, and illegal arms possession related to his activities on Sheep Marketplace. Released on parole in 2021 for good behavior, Jirikovsky's Bitcoin holdings, suspected to exceed 1,500 BTC, were never recovered by authorities.

The controversy surrounding the Bitcoin donation continues to unfold, with former minister Blazek embroiled in a scandal after accepting the donation from a convicted drug dealer. Local reports quickly linked the donation to Jirikovsky, suggesting it originated from Nucleus, another darknet marketplace reportedly connected to him. Blockchain analytics firm Arkham Intelligence traced a significant Bitcoin transaction from a Nucleus wallet in March 2025, marking the platform's first transaction in nine years. Lucien Bourdon, a Bitcoin analyst at Trezor, commented on the traceability of criminal Bitcoin activity, highlighting that while regular users have privacy options, large transfers involving criminals or governments remain visible on the blockchain. Bourdon emphasized the potential for accountability if fiat transactions were equally transparent.
